name: South Korea (Competition & Prestige)
culture_notes: High-speed progression: Show Level 1 to Level 99 in under 5 seconds.
Visual Excellence: Extreme demand for high-quality VFX, glowing armor, and sleek UI.
The 'First/Top' Obsession: Use terms like 'No.1', 'Server First', or 'National Representative'.
Pre-registration Culture: Heavy emphasis on 'Exclusive Launch Rewards' and 'Limited Edition Skins'.

visual_specs.typography: Modern, bold Gothic/Sans-serif Korean fonts. Use neon or metallic textures.
visual_specs.pacing: Ultra-fast. Each cut must deliver a dopamine hit of 'Growth' or 'Victory'.
visual_specs.celebrity_power: Extremely high impact from K-Pop/K-Drama stars or Top-tier Game Streamers.

preferred_bgm: K-Pop style high-energy tracks or epic cinematic orchestral with fast beats.
taboo: General extreme violence or severe local offenses
